live_status_gate.detail: inferBaseStatus() requires hasPrice=true AND Binance source with delayMinutes !== null. BINANCE/BINANCE-WS with null delayMinutes returns 'delayed', never 'live'. Live downgrades to delayed at 5min.

label_centralization.detail: Canonical 6-value DataStatus. All labels via getStatusLabel/getStatusColor from data-status.ts. mapLegacyStatus() normalizes old API values. Local statusLabel/statusColor removed from AssetDetailModal.

source_label_leak.detail: BINANCE-WS sourceLabel TR 'Binance Canlı' → 'Binance WS'. EN 'Binance Live' → 'Binance Stream'. The word Canlı now appears only in dataStatusLabel when TTL/provider rules pass.

price_display_consistency.detail: Market page: buildDataStatusMeta. Dashboard: getStatusLabel() for label output. MarketTicker: source===binance-ws + TTL<5min for live; falls to delayed/no_data. AssetDetailModal: mapLegacyStatus(status)||(livePrice?'delayed':'no_data').

dashboard_realtime_claim.detail: 'Gerçek zamanlı piyasa istihbarat merkezi' removed. Replaced with neutral 'Piyasa istihbarat merkezi'.

market_ticker_source_verify.detail: MarketTicker now maps PriceEntry.source into items. verifiedLiveCount counts only source==='binance-ws' items with TTL<5min. tickerStatus: live only with 3+ verified items; otherwise delayed or no_data.

analysis_gating.detail: hasSufficientData gates target/stop/RR in AssetDetailModal. Uses mappedQualityStatus (post-mapLegacyStatus) to catch both 'insufficient' and 'no_data' from legacy API values.

dashboard_causal_truth.detail: Causal query gated on btcLiveFresh (nowTs-btcEntry.ts<60000 AND price>0). Fake values removed: ||80000, volume_ratio:2.1, indicators:{rsi:62,macd_hist:0.0012}. UI shows 'Causal analiz için güvenilir veri yok.' when not fresh.

performance_zero_state.detail: No gold bar when stats.total===0. Gold segment only when stats.pending>0.

social_radar_percentages.fix_detail: proportional scaling when bull+bear>100; all 1610 combinations verified to sum to 100

mobile_safe_area_css.detail: env(safe-area-inset-top) applied to .app-ticker. viewport-fit:cover and black-translucent set. Real device verification not done.

ticker_duplicates.double_render_note: intentional for seamless CSS scroll animation

browser_mobile_smoke.reason: Playwright Chromium download blocked by network restrictions in sandbox

test_results.deselected_reason: fastapi not in sandbox; pass in CI Ubuntu runner

open_issues.issue: Dashboard/ticker threshold inconsistency — labels now from getStatusLabel()
CI not run on HEAD (21cb0df) — awaiting GitHub Actions
